creator: bd@dbconn.net
text:
After the missing UI bug (https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=272551) was fixed, we still got problems with the UI:

Instead of the UI, only a "file system" with .git-keep is displayed. The problem is the same as it is described in the official Vault bug-tracker:
https://github.com/hashicorp/vault/issues/19266
